hooks.name: Config Template Docs Sync
hooks.description: When strut.conf.template is edited, reminds to update the Configuration wiki page and the stack-management steering file with any new config keys.

action.prompt: The strut.conf template was just edited. Check if any new config keys were added. If so, remind the user to: 1) Add defaults in lib/config.sh load_strut_config() 2) Add validation in lib/cmd_validate.sh if needed 3) Update the wiki Configuration page 4) Update the stack-management steering file
